TOURNAMENTS.title: Tournaments

mode_info.title: Modes explained:
mode_info.round_robin: Round robin: All teams play each other once (optional home & away). Final table decides.
mode_info.knockout: Knockout: Losers are eliminated, winners advance. Optional third-place match.
mode_info.groups_playoff: Groups + Playoffs: Group stage (round robin) followed by knockout for top teams.
mode_info.fields_bracket: Fields → Finals: Phase 1: On each field, mini-brackets determine field winners. Phase 2: Field winners play the overall winner; field losers play placement matches.
mode_info.random_students: Random Teams: Each round, students are randomly assigned to teams. Individual student points are awarded based on team results.

TOURNAMENTS.empty: No tournaments yet. Tap + to create one.
